[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 01101111 6
6 01010001 3
7 00110110 4

01 10 01000001 2
12 21 00010000 1
23 32 00100100 2
34 43 00000001 1
45 54 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
56 65 10100000 2
67 76 01101010 4
70 07 01101111 6 match 5

02 20 00100110 3
13 31 00000001 1
24 42 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
35 53 00100100 2
46 64 00001000 1
57 75 00100100 2
60 06 01101010 4
71 17 01000001 2

03 30 00100101 3
14 41 00000001 1
25 52 00100100 2
36 63 00100000 1
47 74 00001001 2
50 05 00100100 2
61 16 01000000 1
72 27 00100110 3

04 40 00001001 2
15 51 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4
26 62 00100010 2
37 73 00100101 3
[completion]
